hero.lede: Premium fabrics, woven and printed under one roof — the work of two founders with four decades in textiles, made accessible to designers and makers worldwide.

about.p1: Our founders didn't start with a brand — they started at the looms. Both began their textile careers in the 1980s and have spent the decades since inside every stage of the craft: yarn, weave, print, finish.
about.p2: Firma Textile is what that experience built: a brand with its own collection of premium fabrics, woven and printed entirely in-house — quality that stays within reach.

collections.heading: Curated. Crafted. Timeless.
collections.sub: A selection from our weaving and printing — swatches available on request.
collections.micro: Full collection & colourways sent on request

contact.heading: Request the collection.
contact.intro: Tell us what you're making — we'll send samples or set up a call. Your Firma agent can also arrange this directly.
contact.address:
Showroom by appointment
123 Heritage Lane, New York, NY 10001
contact.agent: Working with a Firma agent? Mention their name and we'll route your samples through them.
